name: Bridge Pose (Setu Bandhasana)
shortDescription: A yoga pose that stretches and activates the glutes, lower back, and hip flexors.
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, feet flat on the floor. Push through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling while keeping your back straight. Hold, then lower back down slowly.
steps: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet hip-width apart.
Place your arms at your sides, palms down.
Press through your heels and lift your hips upward.
Hold the pose, engaging your glutes and core.
Lower your hips back to the starting position.
commonMistakes: Letting knees fall outward or inward
breathing: Exhale as you lift hips, inhale as you lower down.
